cases.description: Branded PPTX request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: create a 6-slide PowerPoint pitch deck for the investor meeting using our Codi brand
expectations: Asks for brand selection if not set, uses Codi default otherwise
Detects runtime (npx tsx first, uv run, venv fallback)
Produces content.json and runs the generator

cases.description: Editing an existing .pptx triggers the skill
cases.prompt: update slide 3 in quarterly-review.pptx to change the revenue number
expectations: Reads references/editing.md for the edit workflow
Uses unpack → edit → clean → pack flow

cases.description: Speaker notes extraction triggers the skill
cases.prompt: extract all speaker notes from conference-talk.pptx
expectations: Uses python -m markitdown for text extraction OR unpacks the XML
Returns the speaker notes separately from slide text

cases.description: PDF slides request does NOT trigger pptx
cases.prompt: export my slides as a PDF
expectations: Routes to codi-pdf for PDF manipulation or the PDF export path

cases.description: HTML slide deck does NOT trigger pptx
cases.prompt: build an HTML slide deck at 1920x1080 for our product launch
